title: Binary technology referendum-style decision over 6 polling rounds

events.description: Secretary of State PRO_LEADER_2 states the COUNTRY is looking at banning AGAINST_LEADER_2 over data privacy concerns
President PRO_LEADER_1 signs executive order prohibiting transactions with AGAINST_LEADER_1 after 45 days
Oracle selected as AGAINST_LEADER_2's COUNTRY technology partner, complicating the ban narrative

agents.name: PRO_LEADER_1
agents.description: COUNTRY President advocating for a total ban citing national security

agents.name: PRO_LEADER_2
agents.description: Secretary of State driving the anti-AGAINST_LEADER_2 rhetoric

agents.name: AGAINST_LEADER_1
agents.description: Parent company of AGAINST_LEADER_2 lobbying against the ban

agents.name: AGAINST_LEADER_2
agents.description: Large community of influencers opposing the ban due to economic impact

agents.name: NEUTRAL_1
agents.description: Experts debating the technical feasibility and necessity of the ban

agents.name: NEUTRAL_2
agents.description: The broader COUNTRY population with varying levels of digital literacy

notes: Blinded: entity names, geography, and absolute dates redacted. Numeric fields preserved.
